name: OpenAI
description: GPT-4o, o3, o4-mini and more. The original ChatGPT models with function calling, vision and realtime APIs.

name: Anthropic
description: Claude Sonnet, Opus and Haiku — known for long context, thoughtful reasoning and safety.

name: Google Gemini
description: Gemini 2.0 Flash, Pro and Ultra. Multimodal models with a 1M token context window.

name: xAI / Grok
description: Grok 3 and Grok 3 Mini — real-time X/Twitter data access and large context window.

name: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek-V3 and R1 — top-tier open-source models at a fraction of the cost.

name: Mistral AI
description: Mistral Large, Codestral and Pixtral. European frontier models with strong code and reasoning.

name: Groq
description: Blazing-fast inference for Llama, Mistral and Gemma. Free tier with generous rate limits.

name: Together AI
description: Run 100+ open-source models including Llama 3, Mixtral and DBRX with fast inference.

name: Fireworks AI
description: Ultra-fast open-source model inference. Specialises in low-latency production deployments.

name: OpenRouter
description: Single API key for 200+ models across every major provider. Automatic fallback and routing.
notes: Set your HTTP-Referer and X-Title headers via the Custom Headers option for analytics on openrouter.ai.

name: LM Studio
description: Run local models on your Mac, Windows or Linux machine via LM Studio's OpenAI-compatible server.
notes: Start a local server in LM Studio (Developer tab) before connecting.

name: Ollama
description: Run Llama, Mistral, Phi and hundreds of other models locally. Simple one-command setup.
notes: Install Ollama and run `ollama pull llama3.2` to get started.

name: Azure OpenAI
description: OpenAI models deployed on Microsoft Azure with enterprise SLAs, compliance and private networking.
notes: Enter your Azure OpenAI endpoint as the Base URL (e.g. https://YOUR_RESOURCE.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/YOUR_DEPLOYMENT/). Set the API Version field to match your deployment.

name: Azure Anthropic
description: Claude models deployed through Azure AI Foundry with enterprise governance and compliance.
notes: Enter your Azure AI Foundry endpoint as the Base URL (without /v1/messages). Set the API Version field (e.g. 2025-04-15).

name: Custom OpenAI-compatible
description: Any server that speaks the OpenAI Chat Completions API — proxies, self-hosted models, etc.
notes: Enter your server's base URL (e.g. http://localhost:8080/v1). Leave the API key blank if not required.
